$comment: Single source of truth for Director Gabriel's projects. Loaded by Hermes at session start via skill `projects-registry`. Edit aliases to add search terms. Edit `path` to relocate. Run /projects-registry <name> to look up. Run /projects-registry list to enumerate.

projects.name: ARGUS
projects.description: This directory holds authoring PDFs/ZIPs plus a **conforming ARGUS v1.0-style corpus skeleton** under `argus/`, with a small Python toolkit for **validation, raw ingestion, normalized chunk materialization, and reference retrieval**.
